query: SELECT id, awayTeam, homeTeam, startTimeEst, publishedToFeed, publishedModel, awayBookSpread, homeBookSpread, awayML, homeML, bookTotal, modelRunAt FROM games WHERE gameDate = '2026-03-26' AND sport = 'MLB' ORDER BY startTimeEst ASC LIMIT 11 OFFSET 9;
